description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a dark exterior, featuring a prominent gable roof covered in dark shingles and a single brick chimney. The front facade includes a large glass balcony above the main entrance, which is sheltered by a pergola-style overhang. Windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, with a mix of large and small panes, and the house sits on a paved stone base. The side and rear views reveal additional windows and a continuation of the dark wall cladding, with minimal decorative elements. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing clean lines and functional outdoor spaces. The house appears to be constructed primarily from brick or concrete, with glass and metal accents.
description: A modern two-story house with a dark gable roof, glass balcony, and asymmetrical windows, set on a paved stone base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, glass balcony, pergola overhang, and large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long gable roof, brick chimney, and two smaller windows.
description_view_2: Rear view with a secondary entrance, glass balcony, and additional windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing two large windows and the continuation of the paved base.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a flat door, sheltered by a pergola overhang and a glass balcony above, set on a paved stone base.
